ariaSpec.usage: Explicitly sets the UL role to list.
Provides an accessible name for the file list (e.g. "Attached files").
The scrollable container between the list and its items is presentational, ensuring the list→listitem relationship is preserved in the accessibility tree.
Explicitly sets the LI role to listitem.
Makes the file box focusable. Uses roving tabindex: 0 for the focused item, -1 for the rest.
Provides an accessible name describing the file. Can include the file name and size (e.g. "FileName.pdf 2MB").
The file type icon is decorative and hidden from screen readers.
The remove button is rendered as a decorative span and hidden from screen readers. File removal is handled by keyboard interaction on the listitem itself.

kbSpec.behavior: Focuses the next file in the list. If the focus is on the last file, the focus does not move.
Focuses the previous file in the list. If the focus is on the first file, the focus does not move.
Focuses the first file in the list.
Focuses the last file in the list.
Removes the currently focused file. After removal, the focus moves to the next file in the list if available, or to the previous file if the last file was removed.
